messages.content: when i send a post of my patreon this appear to person who are not member  "Get updates on new public posts.join for free" But i dont public any for free so how i can change that and that appear the low price tier instead of that free tier

To change the message "Get updates on new public posts. Join for free" to showcase your low-price tier, you will need to adjust your Patreon settings. Here's how you can do it:

1. Log in to your Patreon account and go to your Creator Page.
2. Click on the "Settings" tab located in the top menu.
3. In the left sidebar, click on "Tiers."
4. Edit the tier you want to showcase as the low-price tier or create a new tier if needed.
5. Ensure that the tier you want to display as the low-price option is set to public visibility and not limited to patrons-only.
6. Save your changes.

Once you have made these adjustments, when you send a post to non-members, the message should update to reflect the low-price tier rather than the free tier.
how i unable  the option join for free?

Unfortunately, as of now, Patreon does not provide an option to remove the "Join for free" option from the public post message. This message is a standard part of Patreon's interface and cannot be customized. It encourages non-members to engage with your content and potentially convert to paid patrons.

Can i have two patreons and the same paypal direction ?

No, it is not possible to link the same PayPal account to multiple Patreon accounts. Each Patreon account needs to have its unique PayPal or other payment method linked to it. You cannot use the same PayPal account for multiple Patreon campaigns.

new pol of marvel characters , members must be vote for favorite character  poll will have  2 winners make a message for all patrons members

Dear esteemed patrons,

We hope this message finds you well. We wanted to extend our gratitude for being a part of our Patreon community and for your continued support. We have an exciting update regarding the recent poll for new Marvel characters!

Thanks to your enthusiastic participation and votes, we now have the results. We're thrilled to announce that we have not one, but two winners! The chosen characters that will be featured in our upcoming projects are [Character 1] and [Character 2].

We want to express our deepest appreciation for your engagement and involvement in shaping the direction of our work. Your opinions and preferences play a vital role in the creative process, and we value your contribution.

We are truly excited to commence the development and share our progress with you. Throughout this journey, we will keep you posted with exclusive behind-the-scenes content, sneak peeks, and updates on how these winning characters will come to life in our projects.

Once again, thank you for being an integral part of our Patreon community. We couldn't achieve these milestones without your generous support. We are looking forward to bringing these iconic Marvel characters to our projects and continuing to deliver content that excites and inspires you.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team Name]
